title: emilia tenera
intro: Emilia tenera, also known as the Mexican tarragon or sweet algerian, is a perennial herb belonging to the asteraceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Emilia tenera include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
